name: Tex-Mex with Spinach Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine baking mix and 1/2 cup cold water in a bowl; stir until a soft dough forms.
3. Press the dough into the bottom of a greased 13x9-inch baking dish.
4. Cook ground beef in a large nonstick skillet until browned.
5. Stir in taco seasoning mix (dry) and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Spoon the beef mixture over the dough.
7. Combine spinach, ricotta cheese, and chopped green onions; spread evenly over the beef mixture.
8. Mix together Cheddar cheese, sour cream, and beaten egg. Spread evenly over the spinach mixture.
9. Bake in a preheating oven for 30 minutes or until set. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
